title: stachycarpus amarus
intro: Stachycarpus amarus, also known as the bitter-fruit tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stachycarpus amarus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine in the form of tinctures and poultices.
